data.body: R2/b080 COMPLETE + CLOSED SIGNED (2026-07-18). Both changes MERGED to main via Gerrit two-vote gate: #781 (eval pre-registration) merge a67f85f3c542148d13cd031fc21d55c05589e371, #782 (p6 activation) merge 1c28d5ae081874c77ff70d091a1730dc3676f1ae, each LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1, 0 unresolved. First close attempt FAILED completion-verification on 2 ACs: (AC7) needed the landing attestation comment; (AC4) named det_floor as the tag-regex owner but the module-size extraction moved it to det_operator_attested. Resolved by recording an attestation comment (landing evidence + ownership-move explanation with the passing single-source proof) WITHOUT editing the plan-review-attested description (avoids staling that signature). Re-close PASSED: b080 status=closed, signature kind=completion-verifier PASS, attestations=[plan-review, completion-verifier]. Self-gate result unchanged (precision 92.2%). Done.
